---
name: User Story
about: Feature or change described as a user story, structured for implementation
title: "[STORY] "
labels: user-story
assignees: ''
---

## User Story

As a **[type of user]**,
I want **[goal / capability]**,
so that **[benefit / reason]**.

## Context

<!-- Why this matters, what problem it solves, any relevant background.
Link related issues, PRs, or docs. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Testable, specific conditions. Use Given/When/Then if it helps clarity. -->

- [ ] Given ___, when ___, then ___
- [ ] Given ___, when ___, then ___
- [ ] Given ___, when ___, then ___

## Technical Notes

<!-- Anything Claude needs to implement correctly: -->

- **Relevant files/modules:** `path/to/file.ts`, `path/to/other.py`
- **Relevant APIs/endpoints:** 
- **Data model changes:** 
- **Dependencies or libraries to use (or avoid):** 
- **Existing patterns to follow:** (e.g. "match error handling style in `src/utils/errors.ts`")

## Testing Expectations

- [ ] Unit tests for new logic
- [ ] Integration tests if behavior crosses module/service boundaries

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No regressions in related features

## Open Questions

<!-- Anything ambiguous that needs a decision before/during implementation.
If Claude is implementing, it should flag assumptions here rather than
silently guessing. -->

-
